message:
feat(tui): Add CI-friendly test mode, mock data, and JSON state dump

Introduce non-interactive modes for TUI testing and automation, plus
internal improvements across all rch binaries:

TUI Test Infrastructure (rch/src/tui/app.rs):
- Add TuiConfig fields: test_mode, mock_data, dump_state
- test_mode: Render once to TestBackend and print snapshot (no terminal manipulation)
- mock_data: Populate dashboard with deterministic data (no daemon required)
- dump_state: Serialize TuiState to JSON for automation/assertion
- Add build_initial_state() async helper for non-interactive modes
- Implement render_snapshot() using ratatui::TestBackend
- Add buffer_to_string() for converting Buffer to printable text
- Implement state_to_json() for structured state export
- Respect COLUMNS/LINES env vars for test terminal sizing

CLI Integration (rch/src/main.rs):
- Add --test-mode, --mock-data, --dump-state CLI flags
- Wire flags through to TuiConfig

Common Library (rch-common):
- Export testing module with test_guard utilities
- Add new types for state serialization support
- Improve progress pipeline rendering

Worker & Daemon Updates:
- Add necessary Cargo dependencies for new features
- Update main.rs files to handle new config options
- Refine alerts.rs webhook dispatch
- Update cache_cleanup.rs for consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -63,6 +63,7 @@ tempfile = "3.22.0"
 whoami = "2"
 rch-common = { workspace = true }
 proptest = "1.7.0"
+ctor = { workspace = true }
 
 [lints.rust]
 unsafe_code = "forbid"
